title: KidBloom Kids Tool Set with Backpack, 50 PCS Construction Tools with Electric Toy Drill, Helmet and DIY Building Parts, Toys for 3 4 Year Old Boys Gifts
features: All-in-One Tool Set Backpack: Includes a lightweight backpack that stores the entire kids tool set; easy to carry for travel, playdates, or outdoor fun; keeps all tools and accessories neat and organized

Realistic Electric Toy Drill: Battery-powered toy drill with rotating function and changeable bits; mimics real tools to support immersive construction role play; safe and easy for toddlers to use (2x AA batteries not included)
Bonus Safety Gea: Comes with a child-size helmet and goggles; completes the builder look and encourages safe, imaginative play

First Tool Kit Adventure: Packed with DIY accessories like screws, boards, and nails — kids can build airplanes, flowers, robots and more; a hands-on construction toy that sparks imagination and fine motor skills
Great Gift for 3 Year Old Boys: Fun and educational gift for boys age 3 4 5 who love tools and building; encourages parent-child interaction through creative play
